messages.content: 可以把我输入的英文翻译成中文吗
当然可以。请提供您想要翻译的英文内容。

The dynamics of a coupled rigid．flexible rocket launcher is reported．The coupled rigid-flexible rocket launcher is divided into two subsystems，one is a system of rigid bodies，the other a flexible launch tube which can undergo large overall motions spatially．First，the mathematical models for these two subsystems were established respectively．Then the dynamic model for the whole system was obtained by considering the coupling effect between these two subsystems．The approach,which divides a complex system into several simple subsystems first and then obtains the dynamic model for the whole system via combining the existing dynamic models for simple subsystems，can make the modeling procedure efficient and convenient．

报告了一种耦合刚性-柔性火箭发射装置的动力学特性。耦合刚性-柔性火箭发射装置被分为两个子系统，一个是刚体系统，另一个是可以在空间中发生大范围整体运动的柔性发射管。首先，分别建立了这两个子系统的数学模型。然后通过考虑这两个子系统之间的耦合效应，得到了整个系统的动力学模型。该方法将复杂的系统分为若干简单子系统，然后通过组合现有的简单子系统的动力学模型来获得整个系统的动力学模型，可以使建模过程高效且便捷。

The dynamics of a coupled rigid-flexible rocket launcher is reported．The coupled rigid-flexible rocket launcher is divided into two subsystems，one is a system of rigid bodies，the other a flexible launch tube which can undergo large overall motions spatially．First，the mathematical models for these two subsystems were established respectively．Then the dynamic model for the whole system was obtained by considering the coupling effect between these two subsystems．The approach,which divides a complex system into several simple subsystems first and then obtains the dynamic model for the whole system via combining the existing dynamic models for simple subsystems，can make the modeling procedure efficient and convenient．

报道了耦合刚性-柔性火箭发射器的动力学特性。这个耦合的刚性-柔性火箭发射器被分为两个子系统，一个是刚性体系，另一个是可以在空间中发生大范围整体运动的柔性发射管。首先，分别建立了这两个子系统的数学模型。然后通过考虑这两个子系统之间的耦合效应，得到了整个系统的动力学模型。这种方法将复杂的系统首先分为几个简单的子系统，然后通过组合这些简单子系统的现有动力学模型来获得整个系统的动力学模型，可以使建模过程高效且便捷。
可以将我发送的图片里的英文翻译成中文吗
很抱歉，作为一个文字AI助手，我无法直接翻译图片中的英文内容。我只能接收并处理文本输入。如果您能将图片中的内容以文字形式提供给我，我将非常乐意为您提供翻译服务。

The dynamics of a coupled rigid-flexible rocket launcher is reported．The coupled rigid-flexible rocket launcher is divided into two subsystems，one is a system of rigid bodies，the other a flexible launch tube which can undergo large overall motions spatially．First，the mathematical models for these two subsystems were established respectively．Then the dynamic model for the whole system was obtained by considering the coupling effect between these two subsystems．The approach,which divides a complex system into several simple subsystems first and then obtains the dynamic model for the whole system via combining the existing dynamic models for simple subsystems，can make the modeling procedure efficient and convenient．

报道了耦合刚性-柔性火箭发射器的动力学特性。这个耦合的刚性-柔性火箭发射器被分为两个子系统，一个是刚体系统，另一个是可以在空间中发生大范围整体运动的柔性发射管。首先，分别建立了这两个子系统的数学模型。然后通过考虑这两个子系统之间的耦合效应，得到了整个系统的动力学模型。这种方法将复杂的系统首先分为几个简单的子系统，然后通过组合这些简单子系统的现有动力学模型来获得整个系统的动力学模型，可以使建模过程高效且便捷。

The rocket launching system is a typical rigid-flexible coupling system．Generally，a rocket launching system consists of the rocket launcher(including vehicle，yaw body，pitch body，and launch tube)and the rocket．The physical model used in this investigation is shown in Fig．1．
火箭发射系统是一种典型的刚柔耦合系统。通常，火箭发射系统包括火箭发射装置（包括车辆、偏航体、俯仰体和发射管）以及火箭本身。本研究中使用的物理模型如图1所示。

The launcher and the rocket can be regarded as a multi-body system in the case of omitting the clearance between the rocket and the lunch tube．Otherwise，they can be regarded as two different systems．In this case the description of the contact cases between the rocket andthe tube is necessary．From the viewpoint of the launch dynamics，the critical problems，when simulating the dynamic characteristics of the rocket and launcher systems，focus on the following three difficult and hot points：the handling of the rigidity or flexibility of the launch tube(or the rocket)，the judgment and the transformation of the different contact cases between the rocket and the tube，and the handling of the variable structure problem existed in the system．
在忽略火箭与发射管之间间隙的情况下，发射装置和火箭可以被视为多体系统。否则，它们可以被视为两个不同的系统。在这种情况下，对火箭与发射管之间的接触情况进行描述是必要的。从发射动力学的角度来看，模拟火箭和发射装置系统的动态特性时，关键问题集中在以下三个困难和热点问题上：处理发射管（或火箭）的刚性或柔性，判断和转换火箭与发射管之间不同的接触情况，以及处理系统中存在的可变结构问题。

Reference 【1】 handled the problems of the flexible effect of the rocket and tube and the interface contact between the rocket and tube．It regarded the interface contact between the launch tube and the rocket as a spring with double directions and considered the rocket-tube clearance．A flaw existed in Ref．
参考文献【1】处理了火箭和管道的柔性效应以及火箭与管道之间的接口接触问题。它将发射管和火箭之间的接口接触视为一个具有双向弹簧，并考虑了火箭与管道之间的间隙。然而，在该参考文献中存在一个缺陷。

[1] is that the launch tube is modeled as a simple support elastic beam fixed in inemal space．In other words．the launch tube cannot undergo large overall motions in this model．This is not the fact．Reference【2】considered the rocket-tube clearance．It categorized the motions of the rocket relative to the launch tube into three kinds：free hanging of rocket in the air，collision with the launch tube，restricted sliding along the launch tube．And it realized the transformation from one kind of relative motion case to another in the dynamic simulation of the rocket launch system．References 【3】 and 【4】 have solved the problem of variable structure in the system theoretically．Hence，the last two of the three problems mentioned above have been solved effectively already．As for the first problem mentioned above，the key point is how to dispose the flexible effects of the launch tube．The multi-rigid-body model of the rocket launcher regards the launch tube as a rigid-body．

[1]中将发射管建模为在内部空间中固定的简支弹性梁。换句话说，根据这个模型，发射管不能发生大范围的整体运动。然而，这并不符合实际情况。参考文献【2】中考虑了火箭和管道之间的间隙。它将火箭相对于发射管的运动划分为三种情况：火箭在空中自由悬挂，与发射管碰撞，沿着发射管受限滑动。它在火箭发射系统的动态模拟中实现了一种相对运动情况到另一种情况的转换。参考文献【3】和【4】在理论上解决了系统中的可变结构问题。因此，上述提到的最后两个问题已经有效地解决了。至于上述提到的第一个问题，关键是如何处理发射管的柔性效应。火箭发射器的多刚体模型将发射管视为刚体。

Accordingly，the launch tube is included into the pitch body in which the flexible effect of the launch tube is neglected entirely．There exist two kinds of models considering the flexible effect of the launch tube at present．One is the structure dynamics model as done in Ref.[1],which only considers the flexibility of the launch tube but neglects the effect of the large overall motions of the launch tube on its flexible deformation．The other is KED model which only considers the effect of the large overall motions on the flexible deformation motions of the launch tube and does not consider the effect of the flexible deformation motions of the launch tube on its large overall motion.The KED model is more advanced than the model of structure dynamics．However．it is still not a precise model or even a wrong model for the rocket launching system with coupled rigid and flexible motion．Therefore，while the launch tube is flexible，the dynamic model of the rocket launcher must be the rigid—flexible coupling model which considers not only the effect of large overall motions on deformation motions but also the effect of deformation motions on large overall motions．These two kinds of motions are coupled mutually,reciprocal,bidirectional and not unilateral．However，the dynamic model of coupled rigid-flexible systems is rarely adopted in the investigation of the rocket launch dynamics．

因此，发射管被纳入俯仰体中，其中完全忽略了发射管的柔性效应。目前有两种考虑发射管柔性效应的模型。一种是结构动力学模型，如参考文献【1】中所做的那样，它只考虑了发射管的柔性，但忽略了发射管的大范围整体运动对其柔性变形的影响。另一种是KED模型，它只考虑了大范围整体运动对发射管柔性变形运动的影响，而不考虑发射管柔性变形运动对其大范围整体运动的影响。KED模型比结构动力学模型更先进。然而，对于具有耦合刚性和柔性运动的火箭发射系统而言，它仍然不是一个精确的模型，甚至是一个错误的模型。因此，在发射管具有柔性时，火箭发射器的动态模型必须是考虑到大范围整体运动对变形运动的影响，以及变形运动对大范围整体运动的影响的刚柔耦合模型。这两种运动相互耦合，相互影响，是双向的而不是单方向的。然而，在火箭发射动力学的研究中，很少采用刚柔耦合系统的动态模型。

Tms paper is about the dynamic modeling for the rocket launcher with coupled rigid-flexible motion．The dynamic equations of this coupled rigid-flexible system were formulated and the corresponding solutions were presented．The methodology presented in this paper can take full advantage og the existing conclusions of the dynamic models and accordingly make the modeling procedure ef!ficient and convenient．
本论文涉及耦合刚性柔性运动的火箭发射器的动力学建模。对这个耦合刚性柔性系统的动力学方程进行了建立，并给出了相应的解决方案。本论文提出的方法可以充分利用现有动力学模型的结论，从而使建模过程高效且便捷。

This paper is about the dynamic modeling for the rocket launcher with coupled rigid-flexible motion．The dynamic equations of this coupled rigid-flexible system were formulated and the corresponding solutions were presented．The methodology presented in this paper can take full advantage of the existing conclusions of the dynamic models and accordingly make the modeling procedure ef!ficient and convenient．
本文涉及到带有耦合刚性-柔性运动的火箭发射器的动态建模。我们推导出了这个耦合刚性-柔性系统的动态方程，并给出了相应的解决方案。我们提出的方法可以充分利用动力学模型的现有结论，从而使建模过程高效且便捷。
Dynalmic Modeling for Multi-Body Rocket Launcher with Coupled Rigid-Flexible Motion
耦合刚柔性运动的多体火箭发射器的动力学建模
This paper adopted subsystem method to conduct the dynamic modeling for the rigid—flexible coupling rocket launcher system．The methodology of subsystem method follows three basic where in which
本文采用了子系统方法，对刚柔耦合火箭发射器系统进行了动力学建模。子系统方法的方法论遵循三个基本步骤。
